title: ixia conferta var. ochroleuca
intro: Ixia conferta var. ochroleuca, commonly known as the yellow ixia, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The yellow ixia is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the yellow ixia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
